violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the food pantry, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
The 3 bay sink in the kitchen area is in poor repair(observed leakage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
